exemplar.title: Fictional Novel on non-violent crime using forensic psychology

detailedExemplarData.title: Fictional Novel on non-violent crime using forensic psychology

strengths: Handwritten research notes show systematic gathering and synthesis of information.
Effective self-management skills are evident in the planning of each writing phase and schedule adjustments.
Detailed chapter-planning photos provide clear evidence of structured organization linked to success criteria.
weaknesses: Limited detail on research methods and sources reduces clarity on how information was gathered.
The connection between research findings and specific product elements is not explicitly stated.
Reflection on peer feedback is superficial, lacking details on how edits improved the writing.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The student applies research and self-management skills effectively, as shown by artifacts. However, the narrative would be enhanced by specifying research methods, demonstrating how findings shaped the product, and detailing responses to peer feedback.

strengths: The task timeline shows clear sequencing and completion status, reflecting strong planning and time management.
weaknesses: Learning goal lacks specific, measurable outcomes, which makes assessment of achievement difficult.
Success criteria are thoughtful but not tied to measurable standards (e.g., word counts or number of scholarly references).
The product goal description is incomplete and the full scope of the fictional book is unclear.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: While the student demonstrates effective scheduling and self-management with a detailed timeline, the planning section needs more precision. The learning goal and success criteria should be refined to include measurable targets, and the product description should be completed to clearly define its scope.

strengths: Reflection on transferable skills demonstrates thoughtful consideration of academic growth.
Discussion of self-management development shows critical insight into project management.
Plan-vs-reality analysis provides concrete examples of time management and scope adjustments.
Clear plans for continued engagement with forensic psychology indicate sustained interest.
weaknesses: Personal shifts in views on authorship are noted but not linked to future writing strategies.
Product evaluation against each success criterion is missing, limiting evidence of achievement.
Examples of how peer feedback was integrated into the product are not provided.
The evaluation table lacks self-assessment and evidence for each criterion.
Final self-evaluation sections remain unfinished, missing reflections on factual information and cover design.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The reflection is rich in metacognitive insights and future planning, yet it falls short in systematically evaluating the product against its criteria and in showing how feedback informed improvements. Completing these sections will deepen the reflective analysis.

annotations.comment: You clearly state your interest in forensic psychology, but you need to define specific, measurable learning outcomes (e.g., complete three scholarly articles or synthesize key theories) to ensure your learning goal is assessable.
Your product success criteria are thoughtful but would benefit from including measurable standards (e.g., word counts or number of scholarly references) to gauge when each criterion is met.
The description of your product goal ends abruptly. Complete the sentence and clarify the full scope of your fictional book to ensure readers grasp its premise.
Your task timeline shows clear sequencing and completion status, demonstrating strong planning and time management toward achieving your product.
You note you used research skills but give limited detail on methods or sources. Include specifics (e.g., databases searched, journals consulted) to strengthen evidence of ATL application.
Your handwritten notes provide strong evidence of systematic research and synthesis, showcasing effective application of research skills.
You explain how research informs your learning, but explicitly link how these findings shaped a specific aspect of your product (e.g., character profile) to demonstrate impact on quality.
You effectively use self-management skills, planning each writing phase and adjusting schedules when challenges arose, which is critical for sustained progress.
Your detailed chapter-planning photos provide clear evidence of structured self-management, linking each chapter outline to your success criteria.
You describe receiving peer feedback, but reflect more on the specific changes you made and how those edits improved your writing to deepen evidence of social skill application.
You articulate how this project has developed transferable skills for your academic future, showing thoughtful reflection on the impact of your learning.
Your insight about changing views on authorship is reflective, but connect this personal shift to how you will apply new strategies in future writing tasks to strengthen your reflection.
You identify proud achievements but should evaluate these against each success criterion to demonstrate how the product meets or falls short of your own standards.
Your discussion of acquiring self-management skills demonstrates deep reflection on ATL development and its influence on your project management.
Your plan-vs-reality reflection on time management and product scope shows critical self-evaluation and informs how you would adjust for future projects.
You clearly express continued interest in forensic psychology and outline concrete plans to extend your learning over the summer, demonstrating sustained engagement.
You acknowledge peer support but should provide specific examples of how feedback was integrated into your product to illustrate the impact on its quality.
Your evaluation table lists criteria and details but lacks your assessment of how well each criterion was met; add ratings or evidence to complete the reflection.
Your final self-evaluation of strengths and improvements is clear, but several rows remain unfinishedâfully develop the factual information and cover design reflections to conclude your evaluation.
